titles.en: Winter as the believer's spiritual spring
Winter as the believer's spiritual spring

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع يَقُولُ اَلشِّتَاءُ رَبِيعُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ يَطُولُ فِيهِ لَيْلُهُ فَيَسْتَعِينُ بِهِ عَلَى قِيَامِهِ.
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع يَقُولُ اَلشِّتَاءُ رَبِيعُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ يَطُولُ فِيهِ لَيْلُهُ فَيَسْتَعِينُ بِهِ عَلَى قِيَامِهِ.

segments: Mohammad bin Ali Majilwayh, Allah may have mercy upon him, narrated to us from… Mohammed bin Sulaiman ad-Dailami that Abu Abdullah (a) said: Winter is the believer’s spring. Its long nights help the believer offer his rites of worship.
en.badr-shahin.text: Mohammad bin Ali Majilwayh, Allah may have mercy upon him, narrated to us from… Mohammed bin Sulaiman ad-Dailami that Abu Abdullah (a) said: Winter is the believer’s spring. Its long nights help the believer offer his rites of worship.

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ مَاجِيلَوَيْهِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ اَلدَّيْلَمِيِّ قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ مَاجِيلَوَيْهِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ
